tasks.title: KZ-1 runners skeleton repair — REOPENED SECOND TIME
tasks.audit_note: REOPENED SECOND TIME by Claude 2026-06-04. contour_lifecycle_runner.py = 1 byte (empty, SHA unchanged). object_lifecycle_runner.py = 22 bytes (shebang only). kz1_runners_status.json truncated (invalid JSON). Previous DONE was false PASS AGAIN.
tasks.mandatory_objective_pattern: MUST use Run script with Path.write_text() for each runner. See example_objective below.
tasks.example_objective:
Run script:
"""
from pathlib import Path

runners = [
    'governance/runners/contour_lifecycle_runner.py',
    'governance/runners/object_lifecycle_runner.py',
    'governance/runners/managed_channel_consumer.py',
    'governance/runners/object_runner.py',
    'governance/runners/provider_failover.py',
    'governance/runners/role_report_writer.py',
    'governance/runners/curator_router.py',
]

stub = '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
\ndef main():\n    return {"status": "stub", "runner": __file__}\n\nif __name__ == "__main__":\n    import json\n    print(json.dumps(main()))\n'''

for r in runners:
    p = Path(r)
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(stub)
    changed_files.append(str(p))
    assert len(p.read_bytes()) > 50, f'{r} too short'
    import ast; ast.parse(p.read_text())

changed_files.append('governance/state/kz1_runners_status.json')
Path('governance/state/kz1_runners_status.json').write_text('{"status": "PASS", "all_valid": true, "count": ' + str(len(runners)) + '}')
"""
No issue comments.
tasks.proof_required: governance/state/kz1_runners_status.json valid JSON с all_valid=true AND каждый runner > 80 байт AND ast.parse OK
